raw_deadlines: deadline, a first evaluation determines the OFFICIAL SELECTION of the GRANDS PRIX DU DESIGN Awards
closing date of the call for applications), select the discipline and categories you are interested in and
raw_judges: jury of 110+ leading experts in design, architecture, landscape, communication and the built environment — from prominent firms, academia and specialized media worldwide
jury of leading experts in architecture and design, and benefit from a distinction that immediately strengthens your professional credibility with clients and partners
Jury will conduct an online deliberation
raw_criteria: evaluation determines the OFFICIAL SELECTION of the GRANDS PRIX DU DESIGN Awards
evaluation, meet or exceed the competition’s standards of excellence
evaluation is based on a structured framework that analyzes projects according to their intent, execution, and impact
